name: PatternedDisc
_comment: v0.4 example: a 30mm-diameter disc 5mm thick with one off-center boss seed, circular-patterned 6x around the disc's central axis (full 360 degrees, equal spacing).

features.name: CP_Bosses
features._comment: 6 instances equally spaced over 360 degrees. The axis reference point sits on the top circular EDGE of the disc -- the rim at z=5mm, radius=15mm. SW infers the rotation axis (=+z, through origin) from any point on this edge.
